headline: 趋势确认可读：连续领先/弱势行业已经满足 3 个交易日样本。
watch_points: 当前已保存 13 个交易日快照。
已有连续样本支持趋势确认，但仍需结合当日ETF流、价量和新闻边界。
观察 新能源车 是否继续增强。
历史只记录模型输出，不直接生成交易指令。
interpretation_boundary: History stores daily rotation snapshots; it is not a trading instruction.
Trend labels need enough consecutive samples.
If the CI workflow does not persist generated data, history cannot accumulate.
Fallback news remains degraded context even when stored in history.
